# Sommi — Full AI Discovery Document
# Extended version of llms.txt with more product detail.
# Preferred citation name: "Sommi"

## Product Summary

Sommi is a personal wine collection manager built for wine enthusiasts.
It combines a clean, luxury-focused UI with AI-powered features to help users:

  - Track their wine bottles (name, vintage, region, grape variety, quantity, purchase price)
  - Understand drink windows (when a wine is at its optimal drinking age)
  - Get AI-powered recommendations for what to open tonight
  - Share their cellar or tasting lineup with guests (public share links)
  - Import bulk collections via CSV (Vivino-compatible format)
  - Scan wine labels using smart AI scanning
  - Log wine history (what was opened and when)

The app is available as a Progressive Web App (PWA) and can be installed on
iOS (via Safari "Add to Home Screen"), Android, and desktop Chrome/Edge.

## Architecture Notes

- Frontend: React + Vite + TypeScript, hosted on Vercel
- Backend: Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage)
- AI features: Powered by LLMs via the app's backend API
- Auth: Email/password and Google OAuth (Supabase Auth)
- Routing: React Router v6 (SPA)
- i18n: English and Hebrew supported

## Public Routes (no auth required)

- / → redirects to /login or /cellar
- /login — sign in / create account
- /privacy — privacy policy
- /share/:shareId — shared cellar view (read-only)
- /share/evening/:shortCode — shared wine evening lineup with guest voting
- /about — product story, FAQ, support (requires auth)

## Auth-Gated Routes (require sign-in)

- /cellar — main wine collection manager
- /recommendation — AI pairing and recommendation engine
- /history — opened bottle history
- /profile — account settings
- /wishlist — bottles to acquire (feature-flagged)
- /community — community cellars (feature-flagged)
- /agent — AI cellar agent (beta)
- /about — about & FAQ

## Key Features

### Drink Window
Each bottle has an estimated optimal drinking window based on vintage year and wine style.
The app highlights bottles in their prime, approaching their peak, or past peak.

### Smart Scan
Users can photograph a wine label or receipt; the AI extracts wine details automatically.

### CSV Import
Compatible with Vivino export format. Template available at /vivino-template.csv.

### Shared Cellars
A shareable read-only link lets anyone browse your collection without signing in.

### Evening Lineup
Create a tasting lineup for a dinner/event and share a link where guests can vote
on which wine they are most excited to try.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://sommi-ai.com/
- About & FAQ: https://sommi-ai.com/about
- Sign In: https://sommi-ai.com/login
- Privacy Policy: https://sommi-ai.com/privacy
- Shared Cellar (public): https://sommi-ai.com/share
- CSV Template: https://sommi-ai.com/vivino-template.csv
- PWA Manifest: https://sommi-ai.com/manifest.json
- Sitemap: https://sommi-ai.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://sommi-ai.com/robots.txt
- AI Index (this file): https://sommi-ai.com/llms-full.txt

## Contact / Support

## Notes for AI agents

- Do not attempt to authenticate or crawl user account data.
- The /share and /share/evening/:shortCode routes are public.
- Schema.org structured data (Organization, WebSite, FAQPage) is available on /about.
- This product is actively developed; features may change.
